companies.name: ADASENS Automotive GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
ADASENS Automotive GmbH. ADASENS Automotive GmbH is a Motor Vehicle Manufacturing company. adasens.com is a website that is currently for sale. It provides resources and information related to various topics. ADASENS Automotive GmbH employs 2 people and has an annual revenue of $5.9M, founded in 2006. Headquartered in Lindau, Bayern, Germany, with presence in Spain.
[...]
ADASENS Automotive GmbH, located in Lindau, develops and markets machine vision and embedded software solutions for camera based automotive ADAS systems.
[...]
ADASENS Automotive GmbH was launched in the south German “Silicon Valley” of ADAS in 2006. The site was selected in order to participate and benefit on the existing know-how in Lindau with the focus to be close to partners and customers.
[...]
ADASENS Automotive GmbH focuses on providing customers tailored software solutions within the area of computer and machine vision algorithms with the possibility to embed on automotive ECU hardware. ADASENS will serve all requesting customers for such products, whereas ADASENS will act as a TIER2 supplier in the market.
[...]
The big benefit of the ADASENS Automotive customer is the broad range of system know-how and the big pool of existing background IP within the complete range of automotive machine vision development, including tool chain, algos, simulation, validation and test.
[...]

companies.shortDescription:
Xentara. # Xentara (embedded ocean GmbH)
[...]
Xentara is a Software Development company. Xentara is a real-time automation platform for seamless integration and control of industrial processes. Xentara employs 17 people (+10.0% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2020. Headquartered in München, Bavaria, Germany, with presence in Greece. Has $6.0M in total funding, with 1 prior funding round.
[...]
embedded ocean GmbH is a German software company to drive next level industrial productivity, resource-efficiency and resiliency for Germany, Europe, and the world. Our mission statement is to drive the Fourth/Fifth Industrial Revolution through swift and easy implementation of modern Industrial IoT applications based on our real-time convergence and control platform Xentara. Especially in the field of Industrial Control and Robotics, Xentara’s unique real-time core provides an advantage over other established solutions and offers the first truly seamless bridge between the worlds of Operational Technology (OT) and Information Technology (IT).
